## Introduction

Objectives:

- Autocorrelated home range estimation
- https://ecoisilva.github.io/AKDE_minireview/code/AKDE_R-tutorial.html

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
```

## Step 1 - Formatting and loading an animal tracking dataset




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
c1 <- read.csv("../data/yt/gps.csv")
head(c1)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

1 2020-11-06 19:10:39 -129.2876 60.24530 43163 earlywinter
```

## Step 2 - Check for the range residency assumption




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
level <- 0.95 # we want to display 95% confidence intervals
xlim <- c(0,2 %#% "month") # to create a window of 2 months
SVF <- variogram(c1t)
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
plot(SVF, fraction = 1, level = level)
abline(v = 1, col = "red", lty = 2) # adding a line at 1 month 
plot(SVF, xlim = xlim, level = level)
abline(v = 1, col = "red", lty = 2)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](2.3-estimate-hr_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::




## Step 3 - Select best-fit movement model through model selection

**Calculate an automated model guesstimate**




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
GUESS1 <- ctmm.guess(c1t, interactive = FALSE)
# Automated model selection, starting from GUESS
FIT1_ML <- ctmm.select(c1t, GUESS1, method = 'ML')
FIT1_pHREML <- ctmm.select(c1t, GUESS1, method = 'pHREML')
# Reminder: it will default to pHREML if no method is specified.
summary(FIT1_ML)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
$name
[1] "OUF anisotropic"

$DOF
       mean        area   diffusion       speed 
   4.826251    9.343750 1536.327623 3160.767593 

$CI
                                          low          est         high
area (square kilometers)          8244.194197 17719.851857 30759.228166
τ[position] (months)                 2.514979     5.413527    11.652687
τ[velocity] (hours)                  2.646270     2.810199     2.984284
speed (kilometers/day)              10.150593    10.330684    10.510731
diffusion (square kilometers/day)   11.815615    12.429440    13.058591
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(FIT1_pHREML)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
$name
[1] "OUF anisotropic"

$DOF
       mean        area   diffusion       speed 
   4.210549    6.247827 1533.577869 3160.141773 

$CI
                                          low          est         high
area (square kilometers)          7945.432902 21116.696350 40612.445514
τ[position] (months)                 2.424391     6.452467    17.173107
τ[velocity] (hours)                  2.645376     2.809241     2.983256
speed (kilometers/day)              10.151094    10.331212    10.511287
diffusion (square kilometers/day)   11.821063    12.435743    13.065784
```


:::
:::




**Summarize model**




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
FIT1_pHREML_verbose <- ctmm.select(c1t, GUESS1, verbose = TRUE)
summary(FIT1_pHREML_verbose)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
                    ΔAICc ΔRMSPE (km)  DOF[area]
OUF anisotropic    0.0000    18.48885   6.247804
OUF              561.8882    25.52312   5.525294
OU anisotropic  1063.5229    20.16934   4.213728
OUf anisotropic 4389.5706     0.00000 358.324029
```


:::
:::




## Step 4 - Feeding a movement model into the home range estimator

**Run an area-corrected AKDE:**




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
UD1_ML <- akde(c1t, FIT1_ML)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Default grid size of 2.99166666666667 hours chosen for bandwidth(...,fast=TRUE).
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
UD1_pHREML <- akde(c1t, FIT1_pHREML)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Default grid size of 2.99166666666667 hours chosen for bandwidth(...,fast=TRUE).
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(UD1_pHREML)$CI # home range area estimation
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
                             low      est     high
area (square kilometers) 7142.09 18981.64 36506.22
```


:::
:::




## Step 5 - Evaluating additional biases, applying mitigation measures




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(UD1_pHREML)$DOF["area"] # effective sample size of animal1
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
    area 
6.247827 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
nrow(c1t) # absolute sample size
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 4891
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
UD1w_pHREML <- akde(c1t, FIT1_pHREML, weights = TRUE)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Default grid size of 2.99166666666667 hours chosen for bandwidth(...,fast=TRUE).
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](2.3-estimate-hr_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(UD1w_pHREML)$CI # home range area estimation (weighted)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
                              low      est     high
area (square kilometers) 6926.422 18408.45 35403.85
```


:::
:::




**Creating an extent that includes both UDs at the 95% CI level:**




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
EXT <- extent(list(UD1_ML, UD1_pHREML, UD1w_pHREML), level = 0.95)
```
:::




**Plotting pHREML (with and without weights) side-by-side:**




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
plot(c1t, UD = UD1_pHREML, ext = EXT)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
DOP values missing. Assuming DOP=1.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
title(expression("pHREML AKDE"["C"]))
plot(c1t, UD = UD1w_pHREML, ext = EXT)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
DOP values missing. Assuming DOP=1.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
title(expression("pHREML wAKDE"["C"]))
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](2.3-estimate-hr_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-10-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
( 1 - summary(UD1_ML)$CI[1,2] / summary(UD1w_pHREML)$CI[1,2] ) * 100
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 11.55527
```


:::
:::
